title: Ethan Jensen’s CV
text:
Computer Science Student | AI Engineering Minor

jen24008@byui.edu | 208-803-2828 | LinkedIn | GitHub



September 2024 - April 2027 B.S. in Computer Science | Minor: AI Engineering Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, ID

GPA: 4.00
Currently completing coursework in C++ (expected Apr 2026)




Programming Languages: Python, C#, C++
Web Development: HTML, CSS
Software Engineering: Object-Oriented Programming, Data Structures & Algorithms
Databases: MySQL, SQL
Tools & Other: Networking, Data Analysis, QPR Institute Certified



September 2024 - Present GitHub Project Portfolio Personal Portfolio & Academic Projects, Rexburg, ID

Published GitHub Portfolio — 6+ projects including web apps, databases, OOP systems, and applied programming work: github.com/ejens0804
Built 3 websites, multiple MySQL databases, a Python database program, and several C# OOP projects, including an 18-class Bank Management System with a MySQL backend
Building five applied programming projects leveraging Rust, C++, game frameworks, SQL relational databases, and networking to strengthen multi-paradigm software engineering skills

October 2024 BYU-I Hackathon Major League Hacking, Rexburg, ID

Collaborated with a team of 4 developers to create a web application to help college students organize schedules
Learned how full-stack systems function by building a scheduling web app with a team of 4




September 2025 - December 2025 New Student Mentor Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, ID

Mentored 40 incoming students, boosting first-semester retention and engagement through weekly check-ins, campus tours, and resource referrals
Streamlined onboarding and communication with group messaging and personalized outreach, achieving 95% participation in class and on campus events

March 2024 - July 2025 Amazon Delivery Associate Boise Route Works & Inland XMile, Meridian, ID

Delivered 150+ packages per shift with 98%+ success rate, consistently meeting deadlines and safety standards

August 2023 - March 2024 Electronics & Cables Manufacturer Kimco Design & Manufacturing, Meridian, ID

Assembled 50+ electronic components per shift with 99% ROHS compliance, using technical diagrams to build cabling and equipment to IPC/WHMA-A-620 standards
